data.name: LoginReadinessBusy
data.value: Signing you in and restoring your customer session...

data.name: LoginReadinessEmail
data.value: Enter your email address to continue.

data.name: LoginReadinessReady
data.value: Your sign-in details are ready. You can continue now.

data.name: LoginEmailConfirmationRequired
data.value: Please confirm your email address before signing in.

data.name: LoginAccountLocked
data.value: Your account is currently locked. Please contact support.

data.name: ActivationEmailSent
data.value: Confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: ActivationEmailRequestFailed
data.value: Unable to send a confirmation email right now. Please try again.

data.name: RewardsLoadAccountsFailed
data.value: Unable to load your loyalty accounts.

data.name: RewardsAllRewardsUnlockedMessage
data.value: All currently configured rewards are already unlocked for this business.

data.name: RewardsExpiryTrackingDisabled
data.value: Point expiry tracking is not enabled for this loyalty program yet.

data.name: RewardsExpiryTrackingEnabled
data.value: Point expiry tracking is enabled for this loyalty program.

data.name: ServerUnreachableMessage
data.value: Unable to connect to server. Please check your internet connection and server URL, then try again.

data.name: ProfilePushRegistrationStatusIdle
data.value: Push registration has not been synced yet.

data.name: ProfilePushOpenSettingsHint
data.value: If notifications are blocked, open system settings and allow notifications for Loyan.

data.name: ProfilePushOpenSettingsFailed
data.value: Could not open notification settings. Please open app settings manually.

data.name: ProfileCustomerContextEmpty
data.value: No linked CRM customer context is available yet.

data.name: ProfileRequiredNames
data.value: First name and last name are required.

data.name: ProfileRequiredFields
data.value: Please fill all required profile fields before saving.

data.name: PasswordMismatch
data.value: New password and confirmation do not match.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: New password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: PasswordChangeFailed
data.value: Unable to change password. Please check your current password.

data.name: SessionExpiredReLogin
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: ProfileNotLoadedYet
data.value: Profile is not loaded yet. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: MemberPreferencesSubtitle
data.value: Manage your backend-backed communication and analytics preferences.

data.name: MemberPreferencesSaveFailed
data.value: Unable to save privacy preferences right now.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextSubtitle
data.value: Review your linked CRM profile, segments, consent history, and recent interactions.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextEmpty
data.value: No linked CRM customer context is available for this account yet.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextNoSegments
data.value: No CRM segments are currently linked.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextNoConsents
data.value: No consent history is available yet.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextNoInteractions
data.value: No CRM interactions are available yet.

data.name: MemberCustomerContextLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load customer details right now.

data.name: MemberCommerceSubtitle
data.value: Review recent member orders and invoices, retry payments, and copy text documents.

data.name: MemberCommerceOrdersEmpty
data.value: No member orders are available yet.

data.name: MemberCommerceInvoicesEmpty
data.value: No member invoices are available yet.

data.name: MemberCommerceLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load order and invoice history.

data.name: MemberCommercePaymentIntentFailed
data.value: Unable to start a payment retry right now.

data.name: MemberCommerceDocumentDownloadFailed
data.value: Unable to download the document right now.

data.name: MemberAddressesValidationFailed
data.value: Please complete the required address fields before saving.

data.name: MemberAddressesSaveFailed
data.value: Unable to save the address right now.

data.name: MemberAddressesDeleteFailed
data.value: Unable to delete the address right now.

data.name: MemberAddressesDefaultFailed
data.value: Unable to update the default address right now.

data.name: RegisterDescription
data.value: Create your consumer account to start collecting points and rewards.

data.name: RegisterFailed
data.value: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.

data.name: RegisterSuccess
data.value: Your account has been created successfully.

data.name: RegisterSuccessConfirmationSent
data.value: Your account has been created. Please check your email for confirmation.

data.name: RegisterEmailAlreadyUsed
data.value: An account with this email already exists.

data.name: ForgotPasswordDescription
data.value: Enter your email and we will send you password reset instructions if an account exists.

data.name: ForgotPasswordReadinessBusy
data.value: Preparing and sending your password reset instructions...

data.name: ForgotPasswordReadinessEmail
data.value: Enter your email address to receive reset instructions.

data.name: ForgotPasswordReadinessReady
data.value: Your email is ready. Send the reset instructions when you are ready.

data.name: ForgotPasswordSuccess
data.value: If the email exists, password reset instructions have been sent.

data.name: ForgotPasswordFailed
data.value: Unable to request password reset right now. Please try again.

data.name: RegisterAutoLoginFailed
data.value: Your account was created, but automatic sign-in failed. Please login manually.

data.name: RegisterEmailConfirmationSent
data.value: Your account was created. Please confirm your email before signing in.

data.name: DiscoverSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by business name or address

data.name: DiscoverMyBusinessesEmpty
data.value: You have not joined any business yet. Use Explore to join one.

data.name: DiscoverExploreEmpty
data.value: No businesses found for the current search.

data.name: DiscoverLoadJoinedFailed
data.value: Unable to load your joined businesses.

data.name: DiscoverLoadingMessage
data.value: Loading your businesses and nearby discovery results...

data.name: DiscoverLocationUnavailable
data.value: Location is unavailable. Showing broad results instead.

data.name: FeedLoadFailed
data.value: Unable to load feed right now.

data.name: FeedLoadingMessage
data.value: Preparing your loyalty timeline and promotions...

data.name: FeedNoAccountsMessage
data.value: Join a business first to see your feed.

data.name: BusinessJoinFailed
data.value: Unable to join the loyalty program.

data.name: FeedPromotionPolicyDiagnosticsSummaryFormat
data.value: Policy: suppression {0} min · cap {1} | Diagnostics: initial {2}, suppressed {3}, dedup {4}, capped {5}, final {6}

data.name: FeedPromotionDiagnosticsCopyFailed
data.value: Unable to copy promotion diagnostics right now.

data.name: ResetPasswordDescription
data.value: Enter your email, reset token, and new password to complete the reset.

data.name: ResetPasswordNavigateButton
data.value: Already have a token? Reset password

data.name: ResetPasswordSuccess
data.value: Your password has been reset successfully. Please log in with your new password.

data.name: ResetPasswordFailed
data.value: Unable to reset password. Please verify email/token and try again.

data.name: ProfileConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Your profile was updated elsewhere. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: AuthLegalSectionSubtitle
data.value: Review the legal pages before creating an account or signing in.

data.name: LegalHubSubtitle
data.value: Open the current legal and privacy pages maintained on loyan.de.

data.name: LegalOpenFailed
data.value: The legal page could not be opened right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: RegisterReadinessBusy
data.value: Creating your account and preparing your first session...

data.name: RegisterReadinessProfileDetails
data.value: Add your first and last name to continue.

data.name: RegisterReadinessEmail
data.value: Add your email address to continue.

data.name: RegisterReadinessPassword
data.value: Enter and confirm your password to continue.

data.name: RegisterReadinessPasswordLength
data.value: Your password must contain at least 8 characters.

data.name: RegisterReadinessPasswordMismatch
data.value: Your password confirmation must match exactly.

data.name: RegisterReadinessAcknowledgements
data.value: Confirm the required legal acknowledgements to enable account creation.

data.name: RegisterReadinessReady
data.value: Your account details are ready. You can create your account now.

data.name: RegisterTermsAcknowledgementLabel
data.value: I accept the consumer terms before creating my account.

data.name: RegisterPrivacyAcknowledgementLabel
data.value: I confirm that I have reviewed the privacy notice before creating my account.

data.name: RegisterTermsAcceptanceRequired
data.value: Please accept the terms before creating your account.

data.name: RegisterPrivacyAcknowledgementRequired
data.value: Please acknowledge the privacy notice before creating your account.

data.name: AccountDeletionWarningBody
data.value: This action permanently deactivates your account and anonymizes personal data where it is safe to do so.

data.name: AccountDeletionExternalHint
data.value: The app will open https://loyan.de/konto-loeschen in the in-app browser when possible.

data.name: AccountDeletionOpenFailed
data.value: The account deletion request could not be submitted right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: AccountDeletionRetentionHint
data.value: Some transaction and history records may remain for legal or technical reasons, but direct personal data will be removed or replaced.

data.name: AccountDeletionLogoutHint
data.value: After completion you will be signed out and future login with this account will no longer be possible.

data.name: AccountDeletionConfirmationLabel
data.value: I understand that this request is irreversible and want to permanently deactivate and anonymize my account.

data.name: AccountDeletionConfirmationRequired
data.value: Please confirm that you understand the irreversible consequences before continuing.

data.name: AccountDeletionRequestFailed
data.value: Your account deletion request could not be completed right now. Please try again shortly.

data.name: LocationDisclosurePurpose
data.value: Darwin uses your location to show nearby businesses and improve local discovery results.

data.name: LocationDisclosureRequirement
data.value: This feature is optional. You can continue using the app without nearby results if you do not allow location access.

data.name: NotificationDisclosurePurpose
data.value: Darwin requests notification access so the app can deliver loyalty and account-related push messages when you enable them.

data.name: NotificationDisclosureRequirement
data.value: Notifications are optional. If you do not allow them, loyalty updates will remain available inside the app only.

data.name: ProfilePushPermissionNotGranted
data.value: Notification permission was not granted. Push registration was not updated.

data.name: ProfilePushPermissionRequestFailed
data.value: Notification permission could not be requested right now. Please try again.

data.name: QrAccrualHelpText
data.value: Use this when the business should add new points to your account.

data.name: QrRedemptionHelpText
data.value: Use this when you want to redeem points or claim an available reward.

data.name: QrDiscoverGuidanceMessage
data.value: To generate a QR code, first go to Discover, open a business, and join its loyalty program.

data.name: QrRefreshGuidanceMessage
data.value: Accrual creates a QR for earning points. Redemption creates a QR for spending points or rewards.

data.name: QrJoinedStatusMessage
data.value: You have successfully joined this loyalty program. Show this QR code to the business scanner.

data.name: QrNoBusinessSelectedMessage
data.value: No business is selected yet. Please open a business in Discover and join it first.

data.name: ScannerCameraAccessRequiredMessage
data.value: Loyan needs camera access to scan QR codes for loyalty sessions. Please allow camera access or continue with manual token entry.

data.name: ScannerPermissionDeniedMessage
data.value: Camera access has been denied. You can enable it in app settings to scan QR codes, or continue with manual token entry.

data.name: ScannerManualTokenMessage
data.value: No camera is available. Paste the ScanSessionToken or cancel.
